calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-14-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, May 14, 2015 in Department 525:
Respondents/Plaintiffs not presents.
Allal Chrif, Appellant/Defendant appears in Propria Persona with witness Hind Ouchani.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Mr. Chrif and witness are sworn. Allal Chrif testifies on his behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced: Exhibits Not Marked - title of car in Rspondent's name, car registration, oil change receipt by repondent, copy of the insurance bought by respondent, proof of lost of work wages.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence returned to appellant Allal Chrif by the Court.

Judge Richard G. Grotch; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-22-2015 Continued To May-14-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday 22, 2015 in Department 525:
Belaid Youssefi, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona and no appreance by April May.
Allal Chrif, Appellant/Defendant appears in Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn. Belaid Youssefi testifies on his own behalf and responds to questions from Judge Grotch. The following documentary evidence is introduced: Exhibits Not Marked - bank statement, statement of automobile dept., smog test information from automobile credit bureau, & ATM withdrawl,

Allal Chrif requests for continuance because he would like to questions Plaintiff April May who is not present. The Court continues the matter to May 14, 2015 for Plaintiff April May to be present. Court stands adjourned.

Newly evidence returned to Plaintiff/Respondent Youssefi by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Richard Grotch; Clerk Jean Kong; matter not reported.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-19-2015 Continued To Apr-22-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-20-2015 Judgment Entered
